DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION; TO COMPEL DEPOSITION; AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) THE COURT IS PREPARED TO ISSUE AN ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION, ORDERING THAT:(1) EACH OF THE RFAS, SPECIFIED BY NUMBER, IN DEFENDANTS 2ND SET OF REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION BE DEEMED ADMITTED; PLAINTIFF APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION WITHIN 25 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE ORDER IS SERVED ON PLAINTIFF AT A DATE AND TIME SPECIFIED BY DEFENDANT OR AGREED TO BETWEEN THE PARTIES (ASSUMING THAT PLAINTIFF RESPONDS TO THE NOTICE); (3) PLAINTIFF PAY AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2015 WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER IS SERVED ON PLAINTIFF. MR. KELLY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT INCLUDES THE FOREGOING TERMS IN WORD FORMAT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT TIM@NCALEGAL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: J. TIMOTHY NARDELL, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Order Compelling Plaintiffs Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
S. Patrick Kelly, Esq. Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3856 for Defendant DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTY STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTY AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Order Compelling Plaintiffs Deposition.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admitted Requests For Admission; To Compel Deposition; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
S. Patrick Kelly, Esq. 415-554-3856 Deputy City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
No other Appearance.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Mr. Kelly clarifies proposed order to be submitted. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with a modification as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Deem Admitted Requests For Admission; To Compel Deposition; And For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant's unopposed motion - for an order that the truth of Defendant's requests for admission to Plaintiff Sharon Turner be deemed admitted; for an order that Plaintiff be ordered to appear for deposition; and for attorneys' fees - appears to be procedurally proper and well founded. Defendant's motion was continued at the Court's request from May 12, 2023 to June 14, 2023, and it appears that Plaintiff filed no opposition to the motion or code compliant RFAs since motion was filed including in the intervening month since the motion was first set for hearing. The Court is prepared to issue an order granting Defendant's motion, ordering that:(1) each of the RFAs, specified by number, in Defendants 2nd set of requests for admission be deemed admitted; Plaintiff appear for a deposition within 25 days of notice of the order is served on Plaintiff at a date and time specified by Defendant or agreed to between the parties (assuming that Plaintiff responds to the notice); (3) Plaintiff pay an award of monetary sanctions in the amount of $2015 within 30 days after notice of entry of order is served on Plaintiff.

Mr. Kelly to submit a proposed form of order that includes the foregoing terms in Word format to the Judge Pro Tem at tim@ncalegal.com

Judge Pro Tem: J. Timothy Nardell, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
